chunks.title: Woe to Egypt's Allies
chunks.reason: A prophetic oracle condemning reliance on Egyptian military power over God.

chunks.title: Yahweh's Defense of Zion
chunks.reason: A metaphorical speech comparing Yahweh to a lion and flying birds defending Jerusalem.

chunks.title: Call to Return and Repent
chunks.reason: A direct exhortation for Israel to return to God and reject idols.

chunks.title: Fall of the Assyrian
chunks.reason: A concluding oracle predicting the defeat of the Assyrian army by divine intervention.
